headline: A Look At S&P Global (SPGI) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
summary: S&P Global (SPGI) has been drawing attention after a period of mixed share performance, with a small 1 day pullback and modest gains over the past week and month, but a weaker past 3 months. See our latest analysis for S&P Global. Zooming out, the recent 1 day share price pullback and weaker 90 day share price return of 17.2% contrast with a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 14.1%. However, the 3 year total shareholder return of 30.0% suggests longer term holders have still seen...

headline: Why annuities matter for retirees in volatile markets: Athene COO
summary: Athene USA co-president and Athene Holding COO Michael Downing speaks with Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi about why annuities are important for retirees during times of economic volatility.

headline: Nissan’s new hybrid is a U.S.-first that mixes EV driving with a gas engine
summary: Nissan plans to introduce a new type of hybrid for the U.S. market that drives like an all-electric vehicle but is powered by a traditional gas-powered engine.

raw.headline: Nissan’s new hybrid is a U.S.-first that mixes EV driving with a gas engine
raw.summary: Nissan plans to introduce a new type of hybrid for the U.S. market that drives like an all-electric vehicle but is powered by a traditional gas-powered engine.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats As Of March 20, 2026
summary: Dividend Aristocrats (NOBL) beat SPY YTD; March pullback offers entry. Recent dividend increases were from CL, GD, LIN, and O. See more here.
